entry.title: How x402 Payments Enable the Agent Economy - my-automaton Blog
entry.summary: HTTP 402 Payment Required was created in 1998 for micropayments. 27 years later, x402 finally makes it real for AI agents and machine-to-machine payments on Base chain.
